title: Cursor：两年扩至700人，60%财富500强使用
full_text:
Claude on X: "Michael Truell (@mntruell) fell in love with coding at 12. The company he co-founded, @cursor_ai, went from 15 people to 700 in two years.
Today, over 60% of the Fortune 500 build with its AI coding platform. https://t.co/1UROi02oHJ" / X
